title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
